creator: ae@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191795
patch to net/openbgpd port

I looked at the openbgpd code from ports. Port has wrong patch, because of which openbgbd doesn't enable TCP_MD5SIG option for used sockets and thus MD5 signatures don't work.

Can you replace files/patch-bgpd_session.c with attached file and rebuild openbgpd, then test again?
